source_inputs.label: Bounded TikTok search discovery
source_inputs.notes: 120 public metadata records across recent and popular search cohorts; no competitor media was downloaded.

source_inputs.label: Bounded creator profile follow-up
source_inputs.notes: 360 public metadata records from 15 profiles, deduplicated to 326 unique posts during analysis; no competitor media was downloaded.

source_inputs.label: Gemini generation prompt
source_inputs.notes: Purpose-created prompt based on cross-source structures, not source expression.

source_inputs.label: Reviewed creator research report
source_inputs.notes: Separates observed public metadata from inferred creative recommendations.

trend_examples.format: branded career education and relatable job-search content
trend_examples.hook: Help a student recognize qualifications they already earned.
trend_examples.notes: Adapt the useful-before-promotional structure only; do not reuse brand copy, graphics, UI, footage, or campaign expression.

trend_examples.hook: Diagnose the application problem, then provide specific reflection questions.
trend_examples.notes: Use serial clarity and specificity without copying scripts, statistics, wording, or personal identity.

trend_examples.format: student career advice with humor and resource lists
trend_examples.hook: Use a direct warning to replace unfocused application volume with a concrete action.
trend_examples.notes: Treat personal outcome claims as unverified and do not copy wording, footage, identity, or shot structure.

trend_examples.hook: Tie a current student opportunity to a specific preparation checklist.
trend_examples.notes: Every deadline, event, and employer detail requires current first-party verification.

notes: The operator explicitly requested Gemini video generation through the already-authenticated browser.
The generated video remains an unapproved local review asset.
No social upload, posting, account creation, or account automation is authorized by this manifest.
Provider credentials must remain ephemeral and outside the repository.

house_style.promise: Turn earned experience into specific proof
recurring_devices: student problem in the first clause
originality_rules: Adapt cross-source structures, never a source's expression.
Do not copy creator wording, footage, identity, voice, setting, or shot order.
Do not invent student experience or employer facts.
Do not repeat unsupported outcome counts, multipliers, or guarantees.
Use only generated or purpose-created media.
house_style.footer_note: No internship, referral, interview, response, or offer is guaranteed.

slides.visual_direction: Application cards pile up while one role requirement falls through a visual gap.

slides.on_screen_text: Close the gap with experience you actually earned
slides.visual_direction: Coursework, project, and club evidence cards enter the gap.

slides.on_screen_text: Turn one real example into one specific proof point
slides.visual_direction: The evidence cards become a bridge supporting one focused application.
The student corrects one detail and approves the final application manually.

output_requirements.caption: No formal experience does not mean no proof. Start with work you actually earned through coursework, projects, clubs, volunteering, or a job. Translate one relevant example into a specific, accurate proof point, tailor it to the role, then review every detail before you apply. Internships.com can help organize the search and tailoring—you stay in control.
output_requirements.spoken_script: No experience? Don't invent it. Close the proof gap with coursework, projects, or club work. Turn one real example into one specific proof point. Then tailor, review, and apply. You stay in control.
posting_notes: The generated scene must contain no competitor logo, creator likeness, or recognizable application UI.
Add text overlays locally only after reviewing the generated footage.
Do not imply auto-submission or a guaranteed outcome.
Recheck the caption and destination account immediately before any later posting decision.
The generated draft is not approved for posting.

storyboard.visual_direction: Warm student desk; generic application cards pile up and a requirement card falls through a visual gap.
storyboard.action: The student opens too many generic applications, then notices the gap.
storyboard.audio_direction: Fast soft clicks that stop on the word invent.

storyboard.visual_direction: Coursework, project, and club evidence cards close the gap with simple object icons.
storyboard.action: The student selects three truthful evidence sources.
storyboard.dialogue_or_voiceover: Close the proof gap with coursework, projects, or club work.
storyboard.audio_direction: Three tactile placement sounds over an understated beat.

storyboard.visual_direction: The evidence becomes a bridge carrying one focused application into a review tray.
storyboard.action: One application crosses the proof bridge.
storyboard.dialogue_or_voiceover: Turn one real example into one specific proof point.
storyboard.audio_direction: A subtle resolved tone as the bridge locks.

storyboard.visual_direction: The student corrects a detail, reviews the application, and remains visibly in control.
storyboard.action: The student reviews and approves the final draft manually.
storyboard.audio_direction: One calm confirmation click; music ends without a triumphal guarantee.

notes: Prepared for one browser-based Gemini/Veo draft; not approved for posting.

qa_notes: The creative direction is derived from multiple public metadata records and current first-party brand positioning.
No competitor media was downloaded, uploaded, or reused.
Observed public metrics remain separate from creative recommendations.
The prompt prohibits creator likenesses, competitor UI, unsupported claims, and automatic submission.
Gemini output requires local technical and human review before any posting decision.
